verse.name: v1
verse.lines: O my soul, do you not know, Have you not heard? It's been told from the beginning The Lord your God is on your side.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: O my soul, don't be afraid, Hope in the Lord, By His righteousness and power He will strengthen, He will guide.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I will soar on wings like eagles Held by the hand of God; I will run and not grow tired When on His name I call. For the Lord is never weary, His ways are beyond my thoughts, I will trust in Him with all my heart.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And I will rest upon His promise, Patiently I'll wait.
